design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed(title+kind+audience+generated_at) → hero=workflow-command-center, typeface=Cabinet Grotesk, components=[workflow-playbook-timeline, gapless-bento-grid, source-card-dossier], GSAP=[pinned-chapter-scroll, hover-physics]. AIDA Check: hero=Attention, proof+bento=Interest, workflow+media=Desire, CTA band=Action. Font Selection: Cabinet Grotesk from Fontshare. Hero Math Verification: clamp(44px–72px) with max-width 1120px → 2–3 lines. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow:dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded ScrollTrigger + hover physics. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, white secondary CTA, all CTAs point to app.getsupers.com.
headline: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

site_brief.audience: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work. Include a long-form field guide for this niche with concrete workflows, how-to steps, role-specific examples, objections, and a setup checklist.
queries: real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling AI assistant
real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion-focused, editorial-grade niche landing page showing how Super’s personal AI agents operate real apps, reuse a computer-use cache, and reduce friction across follow-ups, listings, and scheduling for busy real estate agents. Includes a practical field guide, step-by-step workflow, risks, checklist, and compliant structured data.
